title: Build a multi-agent system using ADK & MCP
summary: Tutorial on building a production-grade multi-agent system using Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) with Gemini 3 Flash. Demonstrates application through "Critics Cut," a multilingual context-aware AI assistant for content discovery.
writeup: This tutorial from Google Cloud Tech walks through building a production-grade multi-agent system with Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK) and the Model Context Protocol (MCP), running on Gemini 3 Flash. The concrete application is "Critics Cut," a multilingual, context-aware AI assistant for content discovery, which serves as the worked example for coordinating multiple agents. The session covers how ADK structures the agents and how MCP connects them to external context and tools.
